title: Northstar Expansion Underwriting
decision: approve, defer, or reject the expansion investment
prompt:
Create a seven-slide investment-committee underwriting deck for a regional expansion. Show the thesis, unit economics, sources-and-uses waterfall, base/upside/downside scenarios, sensitivities, risks, and recommendation. Use only the supplied assumptions. Include an editable waterfall-style chart, assumptions table, scenario comparison, and return formula. Label every modeled value as an assumption rather than an observed outcome.

Design direction: Use an evidence-led editorial direction: restrained surface treatment, decisive hierarchy, visible provenance, and an inspectable visual argument on every proof slide. Avoid card grids and decorative dashboards.

attachments.content:
item,base,upside,downside,unit
initial_investment,12,12,12,musd
year3_revenue,18,24,13,musd
year3_ebitda_margin,22,27,14,percent
exit_multiple,8,9,6,x
irr,19,31,7,percent

designDirection.label: Evidence editorial
designDirection.instruction: Use an evidence-led editorial direction: restrained surface treatment, decisive hierarchy, visible provenance, and an inspectable visual argument on every proof slide. Avoid card grids and decorative dashboards.
